title: Blood Mages [More Magic Series]
description: Fight with the power of blood magic!
body:
# 📦 Installation
### Required
- AzureLib Armor
- More Runes
- Spell Engine
- More Spell Attributes
- Dragonsteel
 

### Strongly recommended
- Better Combat - for proper weapon mechanics
- More Jewels for - jewels to boost your strengths
# ✨ Features
This mod one new playable class to the game, to compliment the role play experience.

### Blood Mages Spell Book
Craft a Spell Binding Table (just don't forget bookshelves around the Spell Binding Table).

To unlock Blood spells, create the Blood Mages Spell Book on the Spell Binding Table! 

### Explore the armory
Explore new, craftable, Blood Mage equipment, with bonuses to boost blood spell damage.

![Display](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/482f481293176c9da65a8cda3b43fdc6bbbbcdae.png)

Blood Mages: new 2 armor sets, Blood Staves.

# 🔧 Configuration
**Item bonuses:**
- config/blood_mages/item_v3

**Effect bonuses:**
- config/blood_mages/effects
